✦ PokéVault
Seller Dashboard — One-time setup

You need a GitHub Personal Access Token

1Go to github.com/settings/tokens/new
2Note: "PokéVault sync" · Expiration: No expiration
3Under Scopes, tick repo (full control)
4Click "Generate token" → copy the token (starts with ghp_)
5Paste it below
Stored only in your browser · Never uploaded anywhere
Get from console.anthropic.com
Keys stored in localStorage · Never leave this device
